title: JmapClient.request() has no response body size cap; malicious server OOMs process
description: jmap.rs JmapClient::request() calls resp.json().await and resp.text().await with no byte limit on the response body. A malicious JMAP server can return an unbounded JSON response and exhaust process memory. Already have maxBodyValueBytes:8192 on email body values but the outer JMAP response envelope has no cap. Separate from nie-kef6.46 (timeout). Fix: add reqwest response_body_size_limit or read with a cap.
